children.heading: Presidential
children.label: a Presidential
children.text: The Director, each member of the Board, and the Commissioner for Education Statistics may be removed by the President prior to the expiration of the term of each such appointee.

children.heading: Director
children.label: b Director
children.text: Each Commissioner appointed by the Director pursuant to may be removed by the Director prior to the expiration of the term of each such Commissioner.section 9517 of this title
